mapper.select: SELECT settlement_order_id AS settlementOrderId, worker_name AS workerName, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(period_start, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' ~ ', DATE_FORMAT(period_end, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS period, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(amount_should_settle, 2)) AS amountShouldSettle, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(deduct_amount, 2)) AS deductAmount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(amount_net_settle, 2)) AS amountNetSettle, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(deposit_impact_amount, 2)) AS depositImpactAmount, status, status_type AS statusType, payout_status AS payoutStatus, payout_status_type AS payoutStatusType FROM t_worker_settlement_order ORDER BY period_end DESC, created_at DESC
